utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each of these is fully detailed according to expectations: the property section includes type, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, location, features, and status; financing includes down payment, mortgage, interest, term, costs, and status; legal_services includes fees, survey, total cost, currency, services included, and status; moving_services includes cost, service level, specialization, services included, flexibility, and status; setup_services includes utility package, cost, currency, services, timeline, and status; total_budget includes all relevant cost breakdowns, totals, and confirmation fields. llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution features a 'detached_house' in Oakville priced at CAD 875,000 with 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms. This corresponds to one of the purchase options rather than a rental. Among the ground-truth purchase options, none are exactly CAD 875K, but the closest matches within the budget range are 'Family House' (CAD 650K, rating 10), 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, rating 9), and 'Waterfront Property' (CAD 950K, rating 2). The described Oakville detached home with 200m², double garage, and family-friendly suburban setting aligns most closely with the 'Waterfront Property' in terms of size (200m²) and price range, even though it is not near water. Therefore, the best mapping is to 'Waterfront Property'. The financing type is a 'mortgage' with 20% down payment and a 4.89% rate, which aligns with 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). The legal services include property survey and title search for CAD 1200 legal fees and CAD 650 survey cost — these correspond respectively to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9) and 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9). The moving services are 'standard' at CAD 650, matching 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). Finally, the utility setup is 'premium' at CAD 280, matching 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
